fields.label: Fee Type
fields.options:
Processing Fee
Visiting Charge
Inspection Fee
Deductible
Handling Fee
fields.description: Type of fee to charge the customer.

fields.label: Fee Mode
fields.options:
Fixed Amount
Percentage of Estimate
Plan Deductible
fields.description: Fixed Amount = flat fee. Percentage = % of estimated repair cost. Plan Deductible = uses the plan's deductible_amount.

fields.label: Fee Amount
fields.description: Fixed fee amount when mode is 'Fixed Amount'.

fields.label: Min Fee
fields.description: Floor amount — fee will not go below this. 0 = no minimum.

fields.label: Max Fee
fields.description: Ceiling amount — fee will not exceed this. 0 = no cap.

fields.label: When to Collect
fields.options:
After QC
Before Device Receipt
After Repair
fields.description: At which stage to collect this fee. 'After QC' is the standard gate.

fields.label: Applicable Service Modes
fields.description: Comma-separated service modes this fee applies to (Walk-in, Pickup, Courier, On-site). Leave blank = all modes.
